property.name: Donna Louise 2
property.blurb: Brand new LIHTC community — Sunrise corridor, walk to transit.

empty.heading: Welcome
empty.body: Pick a unit type to see what matches.

waitlist.heading: Waitlist is open
waitlist.body: All units occupied — apply to join the waitlist. We'll notify you the moment a unit opens.

allFull.heading: All properties are at capacity
allFull.body: No units or waitlist spots are open right now. Leave your email and we'll let you know the moment that changes.

referral.heading: Priority placement
referral.body: Your referral gives you priority on the waiting list.

returning.heading: Welcome back
returning.body: Pick up where you left off.

disclosure.title: Before you continue
disclosure.fairHousing: Equal Housing Opportunity (HUD Form 928.1). We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, national origin, religion, sex, familial status, or disability.
disclosure.lihtc: This community participates in the Low-Income Housing Tax Credit (LIHTC) program. Household income and eligibility will be verified.
disclosure.state: Nevada disclosures: application fee is $35.95 per adult, non-refundable. Background and credit screening required.
disclosure.ack: I have read and agree to the disclosures above.

notify.question: Want us to notify you when a unit opens?
notify.body: We'll email + SMS you the moment a matching unit becomes available.
